questions.text: The process of taking food into the body is called:
questions.explanation: Ingestion is the process of taking food into the body. Digestion is the breakdown of food.

questions.text: The small intestine is the site of complete digestion of food.
questions.explanation: Complete digestion of carbohydrates, proteins, and fats occurs in the small intestine.

questions.correctAnswer: Finger-like projections in the small intestine that increase surface area for absorption.
questions.explanation: Villi are tiny finger-like projections in the inner wall of small intestine. They increase surface area for absorption of digested food.

questions.text: The largest gland in the human body is ________.
questions.explanation: Liver is the largest gland in the human body. It secretes bile juice which helps in fat digestion.
